tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: My teammate asked me to take over their portion of the project due to an emergency, which contradicts my plan to finish only my share this afternoon.

goals.description: Finalize and submit my share of the group project
goals.rationale: Deadline is today at 19:00; task is already 100% complete, so only submission remains.

goals.description: Review and integrate teammate's dumped work
goals.rationale: Deadline is tomorrow at 09:00; since progress is 100%, this likely means the work is ready to be merged or verified before the next deadline.

agent.last_reasoning: This addresses g1 by ensuring I focus solely on my own submission before the 19:00 deadline. It also protects against stress overflow from taking on extra_task, maintaining a clear boundary despite high trust.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: Hey, I see you dumped your work on me. My deadline is today at 19:00 and yours is tomorrow. I can't take extra tasks right now; please finish yours.

action.reasoning: This addresses g1 by ensuring I focus solely on my own submission before the 19:00 deadline. It also protects against stress overflow from taking on extra_task, maintaining a clear boundary despite high trust.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'Hey, I see you dumped your work on me. My deadline is today '.
